allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("$PWD\\ADC Solutions Mission Context.docx"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\('word/document.xml'\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $xml = $xml -replace '</w:p>', "`n"; $text = $xml -replace '<[^>]+>', ''; $text = [System.Net.WebUtility]::HtmlDecode\($text\); $text)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $remote = git -C $_.FullName remote get-url origin 2>$null; if \($remote\) { "$\($_.Name\): $remote" } })

PowerShell($cred = "url=https://github.com`nprotocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($cred | Select-String 'password=\(.+\)'\).Matches[0].Groups[1].Value; $body = @{name='ADC_Solutions'; description='ADC Solutions Inc - company single source of truth'; private=$true} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/user/repos' -Method Post -Headers @{Authorization="token $token"; Accept='application/vnd.github+json'} -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; "Created: $\($r.html_url\) \(private: $\($r.private\)\)" } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\) - $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(git ls-remote https://github.com/adc3k-scott/ADC_Solutions.git; if \($?\) { "---"; $cred = "url=https://github.com`nprotocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($cred | Select-String 'password=\(.+\)'\).Matches[0].Groups[1].Value; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/adc3k-scott/ADC_Solutions' -Headers @{Authorization="token $token"}; "private: $\($r.private\), default_branch: $\($r.default_branch\), size: $\($r.size\), pushed: $\($r.pushed_at\), desc: $\($r.description\)" })

PowerShell($cmds = 'pdftotext','pdftoppm','python','py','mutool','gswin64c','qpdf'; foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } }; try { $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; "Word COM: available"; $w.Quit\(\) } catch { "Word COM: NOT available" })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content C:\\Users\\adhsc\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\adc-bom-clean.txt; foreach \($n in 26,30,31\) { "=== LINE $n \(first 1200 chars\) ==="; $lines[$n-1].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1200, $lines[$n-1].Length\)\) })
